title: Inside The System: Horror Anomaly
description: This build is made to add atmosphere to the Inside The system mod.
body:
# ⚙️ Inside The System: Anomalies — Horror Edition

Welcome to a broken simulation. **Inside The System** is an immersive psychological and environmental survival horror modpack built on **NeoForge (1.21.1)**. The code is corrupted, the environment is unstable, and you are not alone. 

---

## 👁️ Features & Core Concept

* **Digital Corruption:** Experience a world that feels like a glitching, decaying reality.
* **Terifying Visuals:** Powered by *Insanity Shader* and *EnhancedVisuals* for unmatched atmosphere, blood splatters, and screen distortions.
* **Realistic Soundscapes:** Immersive spatial audio with *Sound Physics Remastered* — every footstep and echo matters.
* **Ultimate Optimization:** Smooth gameplay and high FPS thanks to *Sodium* and *Iris Shaders*.

---

## 🛠️ Modlist Highlight

This modpack carefully balances immersion, performance, and terror. Key modifications include:
* **Inside the system** — The core mechanical and thematic foundation.
* **Insanity Shader** — Dark, foggy, and atmospheric world rendering.
* **EnhancedVisuals** — Heartbeats, blur, and damage indicators.
* **Sound Physics Remastered** — Realistic sound attenuation and echoes.
* **Sodium & Iris** — Industry-standard performance optimizations.

---

## ⚠️ Warning

> *The system is unstable. Anomalies detected. Survival is not guaranteed, CoolPlayer303 has joined you on the server.*

[Inside The system](https://modrinth.com/mod/inside-the-system)
